name: Ginger Snaps (Vegan)
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Apple Butter (or other fat substitute)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
2. Mix all ingredients and stir well.
3. Form 24 round balls (about 2 inches) and place on a lightly sprayed cookie sheet.
4. Moisten the bottom of a drink glass (I use a sponge) and flatten each ball.
5. Bake for 12 to 15 minutes at 375 degrees.
